patch.insert_text: - Vitamin B12 injection ordered; first dose to be given today before leaving.
added_claims: First dose of vitamin B12 to be given today

reasons: Both claims (B12 injection ordered, first dose today) are directly supported by the transcript span.
No existing mention of vitamin B12 in the note; not duplicative of the ferrous sulfate anemia plan.
A treatment/medication order belongs in Assessment and Plan; appending is appropriate.
